overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The scene transitions from a purple-lit indoor corridor to rain-slicked streets lined with digital billboards, then to a foggy waterfront promenade.

scene_state.functional_zone: purple-lit indoor corridor with illuminated advertising panels

events.description: approaching exit from purple-lit corridor to outdoor street

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow purple-lit corridor toward the exit

notable_agents.action: character in red clothing walking ahead toward the corridor exit

entered.detail: walls bathed in intense magenta and purple neon light
large bright rectangular light panels displaying advertisements
debris and paper litter scattered across the tiled floor

segments.scene_description: Walking through a narrow corridor bathed in intense purple neon light with large illuminated advertising panels on the walls. Papers are scattered on the tiled floor as the camera follows a character in red clothing toward the exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street at night with wet pavement and street lighting

events.description: exits purple-lit building into green-teal lit outdoor street
rain becomes visible falling on wet pavement

agents.ego_description: walking along sidewalk following the character in red through the rain

notable_agents.action: character in red clothing walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: rain-slicked multi-lane road reflecting street lights
silver metal barrier separating sidewalk from street
large illuminated advertisement screen on building facade
tall pole with bright white light cutting through fog
modern glass and steel skyscraper with illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: Exiting the building into a rain-slicked urban street illuminated by green-teal street lights. The camera follows the character in red along a sidewalk bordered by a metal railing, with tall buildings and digital billboards visible through the hazy night.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street lined with large digital billboards and modern office towers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past illuminated advertisements

notable_agents.action: character in red continuing to walk ahead in the distance

entered.detail: massive curved digital screen displaying fashion advertisements

segments.scene_description: Proceeding along the wet city sidewalk with massive glowing digital billboards on the left displaying advertisements. The street is empty of vehicles, with tall modern office buildings rising on the right and street lamps cutting through the rainy haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront intersection with view of large building across the bay

events.description: crossing the empty street at crosswalk
turning toward waterfront promenade with view of water and distant buildings

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and turning onto the waterfront walkway

entered.detail: white striped pedestrian crossing on the asphalt
black and yellow striped traffic posts
metal barrier along the edge of the water
modern multi-tiered building with illuminated windows across the bay
dark water of the bay reflecting city lights

segments.scene_description: Crossing the empty rain-slicked street at a crosswalk and turning onto a waterfront promenade. A large curved modern building with illuminated windows becomes visible across the dark water, while bollards and railings line the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy waterfront promenade with street lamps and palm trees

events.description: fog density increases reducing visibility of distant buildings

agents.ego_description: walking alone along the empty waterfront path in the rain

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the left side of the promenade

segments.scene_description: Walking along a desolate waterfront promenade with water on the right and palm trees lining the left. The fog thickens as rain continues to fall, with street lamps creating pools of light on the wet pavement while distant buildings fade into the haze.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, neon-lit interior into a vast, rain-soaked futuristic cityscape that eventually fades into a foggy waterfront. It begins in a narrow corridor bathed in intense purple light and scattered papers, following a character in red toward a bright exit. As the camera moves outside, the purple glow shifts to green-teal street lights reflecting off rain-slicked sidewalks and towering digital billboards that loom through a hazy night. The scene then expands as the character crosses an empty street, turning away from the modern office buildings toward a desolate promenade where a large curved structure glows across dark water. Finally, the environment opens up along the waterfront, where palm trees line the path and the city lights gradually dissolve into a thick, rainy fog.
